description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered, rusted surface, giving it an aged and industrial appearance. The barrel has an open top with a partial internal divider, and a circular opening is visible on the upper partition, possibly for pouring or inserting objects. The interior appears hollow, and the metal surface is mottled with brown and dark gray patches, indicating significant oxidation. There are no visible handles or external reinforcements, and the rim is smooth without any protrusions. The object is robust and utilitarian, likely designed for holding or collecting materials in an outdoor or industrial setting. No visible labels, markings, or decorative elements are present on the exterior.
description: A large, rusted metal barrel with an open top, partial internal divider, and a circular opening on the upper partition. The surface is weathered and industrial, with no handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open top, internal divider, and a circular opening with a dark, shadowed interior.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the oval shape and the partial divider with the circular opening near the rim.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the closed back and the full height of the barrel, with the divider and opening visible from above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the continuous rusted surface and the partial divider with the circular opening.
